footer.slogan: Premium Baby Skincare. Gentle by Nature, Proven by Science.
footer.copyright: © 2024 Loluna Premium Baby Skincare. Gentle by Nature, Proven by Science.

hero.title1: Trusted by 3 Million Moms for Gentle,
hero.desc: Loluna was born from a simple promise: to provide every baby with the purest skincare possible. Our journey began in a kitchen, driven by a parent's love and perfected by clinical science.

vision.title: The Loluna Foundation
vision.desc: Founded on the principles of transparency, clinical safety, and the emotional connection between parent and child.

heritage.title: The "Parent-First" Philosophy
heritage.desc: Every formula we create is tested first on our own children. If it isn't good enough for our family, it isn't good enough for yours.

purity.title: Clinical Purity
purity.desc: Hypoallergenic and dermatologically tested to the highest international standards.

nature.title: Nature's Essence
nature.desc: 98% plant-based ingredients sourced from sustainable, organic farms across the globe.

community.title: 3 Million Moms Can't Be Wrong
community.desc: From our first tube of moisturizing cream to becoming a household name, our growth is fueled by real recommendations from one parent to another.

founder.quote: "We created Loluna because we wanted a world where parents never have to choose between science and safety."
founder.author: — Dr. Elena Rossi, Founder & Mom
founder.p1: When our daughter was born with extremely sensitive skin, we scoured every shelf for products that were truly safe, effective, and sustainable. We found that most products were either too clinical and harsh, or too organic and ineffective.
founder.p2: As a researcher and a mother, I knew there had to be a better way. I spent two years collaborating with world-class pediatric dermatologists to bridge that gap. The result was Loluna—a brand that treats your baby's skin with the same reverence and care we give our own.

cta.title: Start Your Gentle Journey.
cta.desc: Join the millions of parents who trust Loluna for their baby's daily skincare routine. Experience the difference of premium, science-backed care.

hero.desc: Discover our scientifically proven, nature-inspired skincare range designed exclusively for baby's delicate skin.

newsletter.title: Join the Loluna Family
newsletter.desc: Subscribe for exclusive offers, parenting tips, and new product early access.

productDetail.subtitle: with 5X Ceramide & Natural Shea Butter
productDetail.desc: Provide ultimate 24-hour protection for your little one. Our ultra-nourishing lotion absorbs instantly without any greasy residue, fortifying the natural skin barrier to prevent dryness and irritation.

description.title: Description
description.p1: Our Face & Body Baby Lotion is specifically formulated to handle the unique needs of a newborn's developing skin barrier.
description.p2: Unlike adult skin, baby skin loses moisture up to 5 times faster, making our deep-hydration technology critical for preventing dryness and flaking. Infused with a blend of 5 essential ceramides, natural shea butter, and oat extract, it creates a breathable, protective layer that locks in moisture for 24 hours while keeping environmental irritants out.
description.quote: "Melts instantly into the skin without leaving a greasy or sticky residue, allowing you to dress your baby immediately."

ceramide.title: 5X Ceramide Complex
ceramide.desc: Mimics the skin's natural lipid barrier to lock in moisture and protect against irritants.

shea.title: Natural Shea Butter
shea.desc: Intensely nourishes and softens rough patches immediately.

oat.title: Colloidal Oatmeal
oat.desc: Clinically proven to soothe redness, itching, and calm sensitive skin.

step1.title: Cleanse
step1.desc: Start with clean, towel-dried skin after a gentle bath.

step2.title: Dispense
step2.desc: Pump a generous amount of lotion into your hands.

step3.title: Massage
step3.desc: Gently massage in sweeping motions over face and body.
